calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Constucting Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for and with Mary Castiglia. Terilyn Allen interested party also present.

Ms. Allen presented a letter from the Ukrainian Church. Ms. Boessenecker stated that they were no longer recipients of funds, that they gave no indication of objecting to the petition and that there were no other objections. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The Court also pointed out that exhibits A and B were not attached to the order as referenced.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
